description: Machine-readable decision tree for Czech monthly close judgment calls

nodes.label: Anomaly or issue detected during monthly close
Does this affect a filed KH or DAP for a past period?
Is this a blocking issue that prevents filing by deadline?
Is this a DPH payment or receipt over CZK 100,000?
Is this an internal accounting error with no external filing impact?
Continue normal close — no special action needed

sub_nodes.label: Error in already-filed KH
sub_nodes.rule: Any error in A4/B2/A1/B1 regardless of amount requires corrective KH
sub_nodes.action: File corrective KH (opravné KH) for the affected period

sub_nodes.label: Error in already-filed DAP
sub_nodes.rule: Material errors (> CZK 1,000 impact on net DPH) require corrective DAP
sub_nodes.deadline: Before start of any tax audit
sub_nodes.threshold_discretionary: < 1,000 CZK: consider correcting in next period

sub_nodes.label: Missing invoice at Day 24 (day before DPH deadline)
sub_nodes.rule: Cannot claim input DPH without valid daňový doklad. Defer DPH claim. Post 389 accrual for cost.
actions: Defer input DPH claim to period when invoice received
File DAP without the DPH claim for missing invoice

sub_nodes.label: Payroll not finalized by Day 18 (2 days before 20th SP/ZP deadline)
sub_nodes.rule: SP/ZP must be paid by 20th. Process with available data. Estimate missing items.
actions: If payment impossible by 20th: document reason; make payment asap; calculate interest

sub_nodes.label: Bank account blocked
actions: Escalate to CFO + legal same day

sub_nodes.label: Nadměrný odpočet > CZK 500,000
sub_nodes.rule: Always file. Prepare documentation proactively. FÚ has 30 days to respond or refund.
actions: Prepare all B2 invoices and contracts
If FÚ inquiry: respond within 15 working days

sub_nodes.label: DPH payable spikes > 30% vs prior month
sub_nodes.rule: Investigate before filing if time permits. Always file on time.
actions: If error found: file corrective DAP after initial filing

nodes.label: Internal Fix — No External Filing Impact

sub_nodes.label: Wrong cost account (no DPH impact)
sub_nodes.rule: If period hard-locked: post reclassification in current period. If not locked: correct in original period.
actions: If not: correct in original period with approval
If locked: post reclassification in N+1 with description

sub_nodes.label: Depreciation not run or incorrect
sub_nodes.rule: Always correct in the period it belongs to if possible (unlock if needed). Do not defer depreciation.
